title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCL. Games.
content:
There was a man, and his name was Dob,
        And he had a wife, and her name was Mob,
        And he had a dog, and he called it Cob,
        And she had a cat, called Chitterabob.
                        Cob, says Dob,
                        Chitterabob, says Mob,
                        Cob was Dob's dog,
                        Chitterabob Mob's cat.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCL. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
